hero.title: The future of AI education

heroWithChat.description: Learn AI, Data Science and software development with exclusive mentorships, international certification and intensive bootcamps that transform your career. 🚀✨

howItWorks.title: How does it work?
howItWorks.subtitle: Four simple steps to transform your professional career
howItWorks.step1Desc: Create your account with Google and complete the identity validation process for your country.
howItWorks.step2Title: Select and pay for your course
howItWorks.step2Desc: Choose the course you want to take, apply discounts if you have them and make a secure payment.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Access the content, attend monthly mentorships and consult the exclusive Q&A notebook.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Complete the validation exam and get your I365-certified certificate.

benefits.title: Exclusive benefits for
benefits.description: By enrolling in Crea by i365, you not only get access to high-quality courses, but also a series of benefits designed to maximize your learning experience.
benefits.continuousDesc: We never stop learning. New courses and updates so you're always at the forefront.
benefits.lifetimeDesc: Pay once and access forever. Your education is an investment that belongs to you for life.
benefits.updatesDesc: The tech world moves fast, and so do we. Renewed content at no additional cost.

benefitsCore.title: It's not just another course platform.
benefitsCore.subtitle: Everything you need to learn, create and grow — in one place that evolves with you.
benefitsCore.mentorSubtitle: Tambo, Lora or Mico — choose your guide
benefitsCore.mentorDesc: You're not alone. You have a companion who knows you, understands what you need to improve and suggests the next step before you even ask.
benefitsCore.learnDesc: No theory only. Here you build real projects from day one and receive instant corrections. No waiting for anyone.
benefitsCore.immersiveSubtitle: Each topic is a new world
benefitsCore.immersiveDesc: Forget boring platforms. Each module has its own aesthetic, atmosphere and visual style. Learning feels like exploring a new place.
benefitsCore.contentDesc: The platform never sleeps. It automatically searches for the latest tech news and turns it into fresh content. You'll never study outdated material.
benefitsCore.objection1Answer: → Learn at your own pace, AI adapts

cta.title: Ready to become a
cta.description: Join our intensive bootcamps where you'll learn to create real solutions with Generative AI, Low-Code and data analytics.
cta.descriptionHighlight: 8 in-person hours + Mentoring + Certificate signed by COMFAMA, CESDE and I365

accessPending.title: {{name}}, your spot is already reserved
accessPending.description: Your account is registered, but product access is not enabled yet. We'll notify you as soon as this phase opens.
accessPending.statusTitle: You still can't enter the dashboard
accessPending.statusDescription: While your role stays on the waiting list, onboarding, workspace, and organization routes remain blocked to prevent early access. If you prefer to enter now, you can also activate a paid plan from this screen.
accessPending.nextStepsDescription: Keep an eye on your email. Once your access is enabled, we'll take you straight into the platform without requiring a new signup.
accessPending.purchaseTitle: Or, if you want to buy a plan, you can activate it right now
accessPending.purchaseDescription: Open the paid plans catalog whenever you want so you can enter without waiting for the general opening. Once checkout is confirmed, we'll send you to onboarding or the dashboard depending on your status.
accessPending.purchaseLoadError: I couldn't fetch the i365 catalog right now.
accessPending.purchaseOpenError: I couldn't open the plan checkout.
accessPending.purchaseSyncError: The purchase opened, but I couldn't refresh your access automatically yet.
accessPending.purchasePendingSync: We're validating your purchase to enable access.
accessPending.purchaseEmptyTitle: There are no paid plans available right now
accessPending.purchaseEmptyDescription: When new plans are published in i365, they'll appear here automatically.
accessPending.purchasePlanFallbackDescription: Plan synced from the central i365 configuration.
accessPending.purchasePlanFallbackNote: Secure checkout with the plan already preselected.
accessPending.welcomeReady: Your status is saved. If your email is already verified, the welcome message will only be processed once.

cards.emailDescription: Use the magic link to confirm your account and leave your access ready for launch.
cards.reviewDescription: Only users with the real platform permission can enter the product at this stage.
cards.launchDescription: When we unlock your access, we'll notify you so you can enter directly without friction.

sceneHero.headline: Unlock your power of infinite creation

scene2.eli_intro: Hi, I'm Eli, your personal co-pilot and mentor at Crea Academy...
scene2.consume_evolve: You're not here to passively consume hours of video, you're here to evolve...
scene2.designed_adapt: I've been designed to understand your goals, and adapt to your pace...
scene2.multimodal: With my multimodal architecture, I can see exactly what you see.
scene2.stuck_project: Stuck on a project? Share your screen and we'll solve it in real time.
scene2.analyze_routes: I analyze your performance, and structure dynamic paths instantly...
scene2.clear_friction: I clear the friction from your path, so you can focus on mastering the challenge...
scene2.forget_menus: Forget complicated menus and endless searches...
scene2.build_path: Tell me what you need to master, and I will build the path...
scene2.not_simple_chat: I'm not a simple chat... I am the operating system of your mind.
scene2.headline: Meet Eli, your personal mentor.
promises: Dynamic adaptation to the user's pace.
Seamless integration with zero learning curve.

scene1.eyebrow: The end of education as we know it
scene1.headline: The educational model is broken.
scene1.typewriter: Crea Academy is a personalized, gamified learning experience focused on real-world projects.

scene3.headline: Automated corporate learning paths.
sequence: Running a team? Forget wasting budget on useless training.
With a single command, I structure hyper-personalized learning paths for every role in your company.
From enterprise sales to cloud architecture.
...and your team learns exactly what they need to execute today.
promises: Radical savings on external course licenses.
Specialization paths generated in seconds with AI.

card.title: B2B Simulator
card.desc: [Inject Learning Paths or Corporate Dashboard component here]

sequence: At Crea, the student is never passive: they create.
Transform what you learn into podcasts, summaries, or videos instantly.
Stuck on a project or installing software?
Share your screen. I can see exactly what you see...
...and I will guide you with my voice, in real-time, until we solve it together.

scene5.description: Elevate your team's capabilities and empower them to multiply results by integrating AI-driven workflows.

pricing.headline: Welcome to the future of learning.
pricing.description: Select the path that best fits your goals or your company's scale. Start for free, go deep with pro tools, or transform your entire organization with our B2B ecosystem.
pricing.no_card: No credit card required, instant access.

free.name: FREE
free.subtitle: Experience the future of learning without barriers.
features: Free Forever Account: Start today without registering credit cards.
Path Previews: Consume up to 30% of our global learning paths.
Smart Onboarding: Automatic language adaptation to your profile.
AI Interaction Credits: Chat with Eli to test the platform.

creadores.name: CREATORS
creadores.subtitle: Everything in Free, plus...
features: Unlimited AI Interaction: Converse and learn without restrictions.
Total Customization: Design your mentor's avatar, voice, and tone.
Multimedia Autogeneration: Create podcasts, videos, and infographics instantly.
Live Screen Sharing: Proactive assistance on your active tools.
Path Cloning: Duplicate and adapt global paths to your context.

enterprise.name: ENTERPRISE
enterprise.subtitle: Everything in Creators, plus...
features: Corporate Paths: Convert flat manuals into interactive learning paths.
Analytics Dashboard: Measure adoption, hours, and progress in real time.
Transformation Kit: Diagnostics and workshops for executives.
Institutional Agreement: Preferential pricing for the entire workforce.
enterprise.price_subtext: Variable pricing based on your team's volume.
